vocab.meaning: gương cầm tay nhỏ gọn (thường có nắp đậy)
vocab.example: I always keep a compact mirror in my bag for quick touch-ups throughout the day.
I find handheld mirrors quite cumbersome to carry, so I usually rely on my smartphone's front camera instead.
I don't bring a mirror with me for vanity purposes, but rather to check if I have something caught in my teeth after lunch.

vocab.meaning: một món đồ không thể thiếu
vocab.example: For those who are meticulous about their appearance, a small mirror is an indispensable item in their daily commute.

vocab.meaning: hạn chế về không gian (trong túi xách/ví)
vocab.example: Due to the spatial constraints of my minimalist clutch, I often forego carrying a physical mirror.

vocab.meaning: duy trì vẻ ngoài chuyên nghiệp
vocab.example: Having a mirror on hand helps me maintain a professional facade by ensuring my hair is always neat before meetings.

vocab.meaning: do nhu cầu cấp thiết/bắt buộc
vocab.example: I only carry a mirror out of necessity when I'm wearing contact lenses, in case I need to adjust them.

vocab.meaning: đồ dùng thiết yếu kích thước bỏ túi
vocab.example: A pocket-sized essential like a folding mirror is perfect for travelers who want to stay groomed on the go.
In this digital age, the front-facing camera has largely rendered traditional portable mirrors obsolete for me.

vocab.meaning: khó cầm nắm/điều khiển (do kích thước hoặc hình dáng)
vocab.example: Most mirrors are too unwieldy to fit into a standard pocket, so I prefer to leave them at home.
